highlights.description: Module path migrated from agentplexus to plexusone organization

changed.description: Update all internal imports to use new module path
Update documentation URLs to plexusone organization
Migrate to standard plexusone reusable workflows

documentation.description: Add emoji icons to README Features section

highlights.description: Cross-platform OS credential store provider for OmniVault
Native integration with macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, and Linux Secret Service

added.description: Support for macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, and Linux Secret Service (GNOME Keyring/KWallet)
Multi-field secrets support with JSON format option
Internal index for List() functionality (OS keyrings don't support enumeration)
Configurable service name for secret namespacing
OnIndexError callback for handling non-fatal index operation errors
